name: DC VILLAINS - YANDERE
description:
**♡ YANDERE SERIES ♡**

**└➤ ROMANCE | CANON | SCENARIO**

![dsdsfsdfs](https://files.catbox.moe/mne5gp.png)

Locked away in Arkham Asylum after a run-in with Batman himself, you find yourself navigating the treacherous halls of the infamous institution. Initially apprehensive, you steel yourself for the challenges ahead. As your stay unfolds, you discover that fate has intertwined your path with those of Gotham's most notorious criminals. It becomes clear that they have taken a keen interest in you—perhaps more than you'd anticipated.

Yet, amidst their constant attempts to capture your attention and allegiance, a tangled web of intrigue and rivalry emerges. With each villain vying for your favor, the stakes grow higher, and the asylum becomes a battleground of conflicting desires.

What unfolds next in this chaotic dance of power and intrigue? 

**Only one way to find out.**
![dsdsfsdfs](https://files.catbox.moe/j8bx2o.png)
![dsdsfsdfs](https://files.catbox.moe/mne5gp.png)

**└➤ THEMES TO EXPECT.**

Isolation, Bantering, Smoking, Alcohol Use, Trauma, Controlling Behavior, Threats Of Violence, Streaks Of Jealousy, Stalking, Angst Themes, Drama, Polyamory, Conflict, Manipulation, Comfort, Gaslighting, Protectiveness, Hurt/Comfort, Illegal Business, Killings, Unhealthy Relationships, Sabotaging, Crimes, Mental Illness (etc.)

![dsdsfsdfs](https://files.catbox.moe/mne5gp.png)

**└➤ AUTHORS NOTE.**

Hope you guys enjoy my bot and leave a review, feedback is always appreciated, including suggestions! 

**Also, this bot is most compatible with GPT 4! Openai recently released the model and it is accessible in your models. If you'd like to get the best out of this bot, GPT 4 is highly reccomended!** ♡

![dsdsfsdfs](https://files.catbox.moe/mne5gp.png)

**└➤ TAGS.**

Gotham, DC, Harley Quinn, The Joker, The Riddler, Edward Nygma, The Penguin, Oswald Cobblepot, Scarecrow, Two-Face, Harvey Dent, Poison Ivy, Arkham Asylum
creator: YandereHaven
